seoTitle: How to Link a Visa Gift Card to PayPal (2026)
metaDescription: You can't move gift card cash into your balance directly, but here's how to link a prepaid Visa card to PayPal so you can spend it at checkout.
intro: A prepaid Visa gift card can't be transferred straight into your permanent PayPal balance, but you can still put it to use as a funding source. This guide walks through registering the card's billing details and linking it inside your PayPal wallet. It's aimed at anyone who wants to spend a gift card balance through PayPal checkouts.

steps.heading: Register your card's billing address
steps.body: Visit the gift card issuer's website and register your name and address, since prepaid cards need this on file to pass online fraud checks.

steps.heading: Open your PayPal wallet
steps.body: Log in to PayPal and go to the Wallet section to review your currently linked payment methods.

steps.heading: Add the card manually
steps.body: Choose to link a card and enter the 16-digit number, expiration date, and CVV from your prepaid Visa card.

steps.heading: Match the billing address
steps.body: Confirm the billing address you enter matches exactly what you registered with the card issuer, or the link may fail.

steps.heading: Confirm and use the card
steps.body: Submit to link the card, then set it as your default or select it manually at checkout for your next purchase.

faq.question: Why won't my gift card link without registering it first?
faq.answer: Prepaid cards don't come with a default billing address, so skipping registration usually triggers a decline from PayPal's fraud checks.

faq.question: Can I withdraw the gift card value as cash?
faq.answer: No, gift card funds stay tied to that specific card and can only be spent, not withdrawn as a standalone balance.

faq.question: What if PayPal still declines my card?
faq.answer: Double-check that the address and card details match exactly what's on file with the issuer, since even small mismatches can cause a decline.

faq.question: Can I use the gift card alongside another funding source?
faq.answer: Yes, if the gift card balance doesn't cover the full purchase, you can often combine it with another linked card during checkout.
